testcase.name: test_imported_product_fallback_in_tshirts

failure.message: AssertionError: BUG: imported product stored with category='t-shirts' does not appear under /api/shop/type/t-shirts because _garment_type_of ignores the stored category and matches 'vest' → hi-vis first. assert 'TEST_iter27 Running Vest' in ['Personalised T-Shirt', 'Heavy Cotton Workwear Tee', 'Kids T-Shirt', 'Dance & Theatre Tee', 'Cool Sports Tee', 'Training Tee', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration27.py:132: in test_imported_product_fallback_in_tshirts assert f"{TEST_PREFIX} Running Vest" in names, ( E AssertionError: BUG: imported product stored with category='t-shirts' does not appear under /api/shop/type/t-shirts because _garment_type_of ignores the stored category and matches 'vest' → hi-vis first. E assert 'TEST_iter27 Running Vest' in ['Personalised T-Shirt', 'Heavy Cotton Workwear Tee', 'Kids T-Shirt', 'Dance & Theatre Tee', 'Cool Sports Tee', 'Training Tee', ...]

testcase.name: test_imported_running_vest_shows_up_somewhere

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'TEST_iter27 Running Vest' in ['Hi-Vis Vest', 'Athletics Vest', 'Basketball Vest']

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration27.py:144: in test_imported_running_vest_shows_up_somewhere assert f"{TEST_PREFIX} Running Vest" in names E AssertionError: assert 'TEST_iter27 Running Vest' in ['Hi-Vis Vest', 'Athletics Vest', 'Basketball Vest']
